provider.name: IRB Barcelona
provider.description: A database with molecular dynamics for biological molecules

trajectories.name: mdref
trajectories.description: Index of the reference MD.

trajectories.name: mds
trajectories.description: Data related to the actual trajectories inside the current project.

trajectories.name: metadata.TIMESTEP
trajectories.description: The timestep between frames of the trajectory.

trajectories.name: metadata.LENGTH
trajectories.description: The duration of the trajectory

trajectories.name: metadata.FF
trajectories.description: Forcefields used to model the molecular dynamics

trajectories.name: metadata.TEMP
trajectories.description: Temperature used to model the molecular dynamics

trajectories.name: metadata.PROGRAM
trajectories.description: Name of the software used to model the molecular dynamics

trajectories.name: metadata.VERSION
trajectories.description: Version of the software used to model the molecular dynamics

trajectories.name: metadata.LICENCE
trajectories.description: Use license for simulation data

trajectories.name: metadata.LINKCENSE
trajectories.description: Link to use license for simulation data

trajectories.name: metadata.CITATION
trajectories.description: Reference to cite the simulation data

trajectories.name: metadata.DESCRIPTION
trajectories.description: Description of the simulation

trajectories.name: metadata.GROUPS
trajectories.description: Groups involved in the modelling of the simulation

trajectories.name: metadata.CONTACT
trajectories.description: Reference to contact the simulation authors (e.g. mail)

trajectories.name: metadata.THANKS
trajectories.description: Acknowledgements from the authors

trajectories.name: metadata.PDBIDS
trajectories.description: PDB ids of structures used in the modelling of the simulation

trajectories.name: metadata.METHOD
trajectories.description: Method used in the modelling of the simulation (e.g. Classical MD, Enhanced sampling, etc.)

trajectories.name: metadata.TYPE
trajectories.description: Type of molecular dynamics ('trajectory' or 'ensemble')

trajectories.name: metadata.LINKS
trajectories.description: irb-dev.mddbr.eu links to simulation related web sites

trajectories.name: metadata.AUTHORS
trajectories.description: Simulation authors

trajectories.name: residues
trajectories.description:
**For each residue in the system there is a dictionary that describes this residue. Residues are groups of related atoms (e.g. an aminoacid). 
  Databases are allowed to add more properties as long as the properties are prefixed with the database specific prefix.
- **Type**: list of dictionaries with the properties:
   - :property:`name`: string (REQUIRED)
    - :property:`number`: integer (REQUIRED)
    - :property:`icode`: string or null (REQUIRED)
    - :property:`chain`: string (OPTIONAL)
- **Requirements/Conventions**:
   - **Query**:  Support for queries on this property is OPTIONAL.
     If supported, only a subset of the filter features MAY be supported.
   - **name**: The residue name
   - **number**: The residue number according to source notation.
   - **icode**: The residue insertion code. It MUST NOT be longer than 1 character. It MAY be null.
   - **chain**: The chain number this residue belongs to.
   - Values in :property:`chain` SHOULD be in capital letters.
   - Values in :property:`chain` SHOULD NOT be longer than 1 character when the number of chains is not greater than the number of letters in English alphabet (26).
   - All :property:`name` and :property:`icode` values SHOULD be in capital letters.

trajectories.name: residues_at_sites
trajectories.description:
Index of the residue to which a site belongs. The values for sites are specified with the same order of the property `cartesian_site_positions`_.
  The properties of the residues are found in the property `_biomol_residues`_.
- **Type**: list of integers.
- **Requirements/Conventions**:
  - **Support**: MUST be supported when `_biomol_residues`_ is present as well, i.e., MUST NOT be :val:`null`.
  - **Query**: Support for queries on this property is OPTIONAL.
    If supported, filters MAY support only a subset of comparison operators.
  - The number of values MUST be equal to :property: `nsites`, i.e. the number of sites in the structure.
  - Each value in the `_biomol_residues_at_sites`_ list MUST correspond to  the index of one the dictionaries in the `_biomol_residues`_ list.
